user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Feature Request

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out and following up on this! I completely understand that it can be frustrating to wait for a feature you requested a while ago, and I appreciate your patience.

I just checked on your request from six months ago. It is still open and actively on our product team's radar. We prioritize updates based on a mix of user demand and our current development roadmap, and while I don't have a specific timeline for when this will be released, I have added your recent message to the ticket. This bumps its visibility with our developers and shows them that this feature is still highly desired by our users. 

I will make sure to keep your ticket linked so we can notify you the moment there is an update or a beta version available to test. 

Please let me know if you have any other questions or if there is anything else I can help you with in the meantime!

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a support task, categorized it, and provided a professional draft response as instructed in its system prompt.
